description: Guided patient lines for spoken rehearsal and uploaded-audio prompts across realistic provider-side phone and consultation journeys.
notes: This pack models a real patient interaction, including registration and identity verification before clinical discussion.
Optional audio_clip files are looked up in the repository avatar/ folder and played through /media/<filename>.

scenarios.title: New patient calling provider for urgent symptoms
scenarios.persona_hint: adult patient with no prior record

lines.text: Hello, I am a new patient and I need help registering because I have chest discomfort today.
My full name is Amina Njeri, date of birth 1990-04-22, and my phone number is +254 712 345 678.
I live in Nairobi, Westlands area, and I can come to the clinic in about forty minutes if needed.
Please use SMS for updates and call my sister Grace on +254 700 111 222 if you cannot reach me.
I have SHA cover but I do not remember my member number right now. Can you still begin triage while I retrieve it?
Yes, I consent to use my information for clinical care and referral if this is an emergency.
The chest pressure started about thirty minutes ago while I was climbing stairs.
The pain is seven out of ten and it spreads to my left shoulder.
I feel short of breath and nauseated, but I have not fainted and I can still speak in full sentences.
I have hypertension, I took my blood pressure medicine this morning, and I have no known drug allergies.
My father had a heart attack at fifty-six, so I am worried this could be serious.
Could you tell me what should happen in the next ten minutes and whether I should come immediately or call emergency transport?
I am a returning patient. My hospital number is HC-20491 and I was discharged two days ago.
I am calling because I still have intermittent chest tightness when I walk.
I took aspirin and my blood pressure tablets as prescribed, but the tightness returns in the evening.
Please confirm which warning signs should make me call emergency services right away.
I am calling because I feel unwell and need guidance on what to do next.
I can provide my full name, date of birth, national ID, and contact number to complete registration.
